task_tokens_consumed: Is a provable-convergence contraction-mapping iterative LLM agent mechanism anticipated by 2024-2026 prior art?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: Iterative LLM agents that refine outputs via repeated self-critique loops.
Sample multiple completions and vote/aggregate; convergence via consistency.

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_name: Dynamical systems analysis of LLM loops
hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: Agentic loops analyzed as dynamical systems with trajectories/attractors.
Theoretical analyses with Lipschitz bounds on LLM outputs and convergence guarantees.
LLM agents framed as solving an optimization problem via iteration.

landscape_completeness_claim: Five clusters cover self-refine, voting, dynamical-systems, Lipschitz theory, optimization. Picard-Lindelöf specific framing is in C4 (Lipschitz/Banach theory).
